basics.name: Chenyu Lu
basics.summary: Computer Science & Mathematics student at HKUST with research interests in statistical machine learning and learning theory. Current work includes research assistant work with Prof. Nian Si, independent benchmark work on large language models' web-fetch ability, and a part-time internship at the Hong Kong Observatory.

work.summary: Working with Dr. Wallace S. W. Chan's team on Low Altitude Economy and aviation-related subjects.
highlights: Supporting real-world aviation data analysis, AI application, and related problem exploration

education.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
education.area: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Mathematics
notes: Student Member, The Hong Kong Institution of Engineers (2026-2027)

publications.name: ScaleCUA: Scaling Open-Source Computer Use Agents with Cross-Platform Data
publications.summary: Co-authored preprint connected to GUI agent research at HKUST, with contribution focused on large-scale data collection and preprocessing.

presentations.name: GUI Agent Project Research Presentation
presentations.event: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
presentations.description: Internal presentation connected to summer GUI agent research work.

teaching.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
teaching.description: Provided academic guidance on core discrete mathematics concepts and assisted with course support.

teaching.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
teaching.description: Helped students navigate graduation requirements and supported seminar registration checks.

portfolio.name: HKO Flight Weather Dashboard
portfolio.description: Dashboard for HKIA flight situational awareness using public flight, METAR, and TAF data.

portfolio.name: Codex Completion Sound
portfolio.description: Small Codex skill that plays a completion sound when a Codex task finishes.

portfolio.name: OpenGVLab/ScaleCUA Contribution
portfolio.description: Contribution in ScaleCUA: data pipeline and cross-platform workflow components in the open-source codebase.
